seoTitle: Lillicur vs Lilliput — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lillicur and Lilliput. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lillicur and Lilliput.
heading: Lillicur vs Lilliput — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lillicur, Victoria and Lilliput, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lilliput has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Lillicur (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lillicur or Lilliput safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lillicur has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Lilliput scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lillicur scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Lilliput scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lillicur or Lilliput?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lilliput has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
